document_metadata.title: Website to Facebook Messenger Custom Integration

executive_summary: Meta deprecated the native Customer Chat Plugin in May 2024. This project builds a custom, API-first chat widget that bridges website visitors to the Facebook Page Inbox via the Meta Graph API. The architecture uses Next.js API routes as middleware and a React frontend widget, replacing the old SDK-based FacebookMessenger.js component entirely.
access_prerequisites: Manage access to the target Facebook Page
Meta App created with the 'Messenger' product enabled
Generated Page Access Token (PAT) with 'pages_messaging' and 'pages_show_list' permissions
Webhook subscription URL pointing to production /api/messenger/webhook

architecture_strategy.frontend_client: Custom floating chat UI component (React/Next.js) replacing the deprecated FacebookMessenger.js SDK widget.
architecture_strategy.middleware_layer: Next.js API routes at pages/api/messenger/ — handles webhook verification, incoming messages from Meta, and outgoing messages from the frontend.
architecture_strategy.data_flow: Visitor types message → Frontend POST /api/messenger/send → Middleware forwards to Graph API → Meta delivers to Page Inbox → Page admin replies → Meta POST /api/messenger/webhook → Middleware stores in memory → Frontend polls /api/messenger/messages → UI displays reply

functional_requirements: FR1: The system must render a toggleable floating chat window on the website (replacing old FacebookMessenger.js).
FR2: The system must capture user text inputs and send them to the middleware via POST /api/messenger/send.
FR3: The middleware must transmit outgoing messages to the Meta Graph API using the Page Access Token.
FR4: The system must receive and display real-time replies from the Facebook Page inbox via Meta Webhooks (POST /api/messenger/webhook).
FR5: The client must handle guest user session IDs via localStorage to maintain conversation state without requiring a Facebook login.
FR6: The backend must respond to Meta's 'hub.challenge' to validate the webhook connection (GET /api/messenger/webhook).
FR7: The system must store recent messages in-memory (server-side) keyed by sender PSID for polling.
FR8: The frontend must poll GET /api/messenger/messages?senderId=X every 3 seconds for new messages.
FR9: The UI must show message timestamps, typing indicators, and send status.
FR10: Environment variables FB_PAGE_ID, FB_APP_SECRET, FB_VERIFY_TOKEN, and FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN must be server-only (no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix).

execution_milestones.name: Environment & Configuration Setup
tasks: Add new server-only env vars to .env.example (FB_PAGE_ID, FB_APP_SECRET, FB_VERIFY_TOKEN, FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN).
Remove old NEXT_PUBLIC_FB_PAGE_ID and NEXT_PUBLIC_FB_APP_ID from .env.example.
Update AGENTS.md with Messenger integration notes.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): add environment variables for Meta Graph API integration

execution_milestones.name: Webhook Verification Endpoint
tasks: Create pages/api/messenger/ directory structure.
Create pages/api/messenger/webhook.js with GET handler for hub.challenge verification.
Validate hub.verify_token against FB_VERIFY_TOKEN env var.
Return hub.challenge on success, 403 on mismatch.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): create webhook verification endpoint (GET /api/messenger/webhook)

execution_milestones.name: Incoming Webhook Handler
tasks: Add POST handler to pages/api/messenger/webhook.js for incoming messages.
Parse Meta's webhook payload (entry[].messaging[].message).
Store messages in an in-memory Map keyed by sender PSID.
Handle message echoes and delivery confirmations gracefully.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): implement incoming webhook POST handler for message reception

execution_milestones.name: In-Memory Message Store
tasks: Create lib/messenger/messageStore.js — a singleton in-memory store.
Implement addMessage(senderId, message), getMessages(senderId, since), and cleanup logic.
Auto-expire messages older than 24 hours to prevent memory leaks.
Export store for use by webhook and send endpoints.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): create in-memory message store for conversation state

execution_milestones.name: Send Message Endpoint
tasks: Create pages/api/messenger/send.js — POST endpoint for frontend to send messages.
Accept { senderId, text } from frontend body.
Forward message to Meta Graph API: POST graph.facebook.com/v21.0/me/messages.
Use FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN in Authorization header.
Store outgoing message in messageStore for polling.
Return success/error to frontend.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): create send message endpoint (POST /api/messenger/send)

execution_milestones.name: Messages Polling Endpoint
tasks: Create pages/api/messenger/messages.js — GET endpoint for frontend polling.
Accept ?senderId=X&since=timestamp query params.
Return messages from messageStore filtered by sender and time.
Return empty array if no new messages.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): create messages polling endpoint (GET /api/messenger/messages)

execution_milestones.name: Session ID Generator Utility
tasks: Create lib/messenger/session.js — generates and persists unique session IDs.
Use crypto.randomUUID() for new sessions.
Store session ID in localStorage under 'messenger_session_id'.
Export getSessionId() for use by the frontend widget.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): create client-side session ID generator with localStorage

execution_milestones.name: Chat Widget UI Component
tasks: Create components/MessengerChat.js — the main floating chat widget.
Build toggle button (Messenger icon) fixed to bottom-right.
Build chat window with header, message list, and input field.
Use framer-motion for open/close animations.
Style with CSS modules (MessengerChat.module.css).
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): build floating chat widget UI component

execution_milestones.name: Chat Widget Message Bubbles
tasks: Create components/messenger/MessageBubble.js — individual message component.
Differentiate user messages (right-aligned, blue) vs page messages (left-aligned, gray).
Show timestamp below each message.
Handle text wrapping and max-width constraints.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): create message bubble component with user/page styling

execution_milestones.name: Chat Widget State Management
tasks: Implement useState for messages array, input text, isOpen toggle, and isLoading.
On mount, generate/load session ID from localStorage.
On send: POST to /api/messenger/send, append message to local state.
Implement polling (useEffect + setInterval) every 3s to GET /api/messenger/messages.
Merge new messages from polling into local state without duplicates.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): implement chat widget state management and polling

execution_milestones.name: Chat Widget Integration in _app.js
tasks: Replace old <AppFacebookMessenger /> in pages/_app.js with new <MessengerChat />.
Remove import of old FacebookMessenger component.
Import new MessengerChat component.
Pass FB_PAGE_ID from env as prop if needed for identification.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): integrate new MessengerChat widget in _app.js

execution_milestones.name: Remove Deprecated FacebookMessenger Component
tasks: Delete components/FacebookMessenger.js (old SDK-based widget).
Delete components/FacebookMessenger.module.css.
Remove any remaining references to the old component.
Clean up env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_FB_PAGE_ID and NEXT_PUBLIC_FB_APP_ID.
execution_milestones.commit_message: refactor(messenger): remove deprecated SDK-based FacebookMessenger component

execution_milestones.name: Typing Indicator Component
tasks: Create components/messenger/TypingIndicator.js — animated dots shown when page is typing.
Show after user sends a message, hide when reply arrives.
Use CSS animation for three bouncing dots.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): add typing indicator component

execution_milestones.name: Empty State & Welcome Message
tasks: Create components/messenger/WelcomeMessage.js — shown when chat is first opened.
Display configurable greeting text and page name.
Show 'Send us a message to get started' prompt.
Auto-hide after first message is sent.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): add welcome message and empty state UI

execution_milestones.name: Error Handling & Retry Logic
tasks: Add error state to MessengerChat widget.
Show error banner if /api/messenger/send fails.
Implement retry button that re-sends the last failed message.
Handle network disconnections gracefully.
Add rate limit handling (429 responses).
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): add error handling and retry logic to chat widget

execution_milestones.name: Mobile Responsive Design
tasks: Update MessengerChat.module.css for mobile breakpoints.
On mobile: chat window takes full width/height.
Toggle button repositioned for thumb accessibility.
Ensure keyboard input doesn't break layout on mobile.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): optimize chat widget for mobile responsiveness

execution_milestones.name: Security Hardening
tasks: Verify no FB tokens are exposed in NEXT_PUBLIC_ vars.
Add HMAC signature verification for incoming webhook payloads from Meta.
Validate Content-Type header on webhook POST.
Add CORS restrictions to messenger API routes.
Ensure message content is sanitized before display (XSS prevention).
execution_milestones.commit_message: security(messenger): add webhook signature verification and XSS protection

execution_milestones.name: Rate Limiting for Messenger Endpoints
tasks: Add per-IP rate limiting to /api/messenger/send (reuse pattern from chat.js).
Limit to 20 messages per minute per session.
Add rate limit headers in response.
Show rate limit warning in UI when approaching limit.
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(messenger): add rate limiting to send message endpoint

execution_milestones.name: Content Security Policy Update
tasks: Update next.config.mjs CSP headers to allow Meta Graph API connections.
Add graph.facebook.com to connect-src directive.
Add webhook domain to img-src if needed for profile pictures.
execution_milestones.commit_message: fix(messenger): update CSP headers for Meta Graph API connectivity

execution_milestones.name: AGENTS.md & Documentation Update
tasks: Update AGENTS.md with Messenger integration architecture.
Document the new API routes and their requirements.
Add troubleshooting section for common Meta API issues.
Update environment variables documentation.
execution_milestones.commit_message: docs(messenger): update AGENTS.md with Messenger integration architecture

execution_milestones.name: Final PRD Update & Status
tasks: Mark all slices as completed in prd.json.
Add implementation status and commit hashes.
Update version to 2.0.0 status to 'Implemented'.
execution_milestones.commit_message: docs(prd): mark all Messenger integration slices as implemented

commit_history.message: feat(messenger): add environment variables for Meta Graph API integration
feat(messenger): implement incoming webhook POST handler for message reception
feat(messenger): create in-memory message store for conversation state
feat(messenger): create client-side session ID generator with localStorage
feat(messenger): build floating chat widget UI component
feat(messenger): add message bubble, typing indicator, and welcome components
feat(messenger): integrate new MessengerChat widget in _app.js
refactor(messenger): remove deprecated SDK-based FacebookMessenger component
security(messenger): add webhook signature verification and XSS protection
feat(messenger): add rate limiting to send message endpoint
fix(messenger): update CSP headers for Meta Graph API connectivity
docs(messenger): update AGENTS.md with Messenger integration architecture
